steps.t: Tálbiral has asked that you head south from Laivárth to an Orc camp called Mokh Grazádh and look for signs that they may be spreading the blight.
Tálbiral has asked that you head south from Laivárth to an Orc camp called Mokh Grazádh and look for signs that they may be spreading the blight.
Return to Tálbiral in Laivárth and let him know what you discovered of the Orcs plans in Mokh Grazádh.
